overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking through a misty rural landscape. The journey progresses from open grasslands with abandoned ruins and utility poles, through a narrow rocky canyon, and finally into a shallow river crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with abandoned ruins and utility poles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward rocky canyon entrance

entered.detail: series of wooden telephone poles with crossbars and wires running along the path
dilapidated stone structure with broken walls partially overgrown with grass
muddy dirt path with wagon wheel ruts cutting through grassland
tall green grass covering rolling hills on either side of the trail
large rock formations visible in the misty distance marking the canyon entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open misty grassland with abandoned stone ruins on the left and utility poles lining the path. The terrain is flat with tall grass on either side of the dirt trail, leading toward distant rocky cliffs barely visible through the morning haze.

events.description: entering narrow rocky canyon from open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking through confined canyon passage between steep rock walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall with rough texture and patches of moss on the left side
tall steep rock wall casting shadows on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls rising on both sides. The dirt trail continues through the confined passage, with utility poles still visible in the distance ahead. The sky is partially obscured by the canyon walls, creating a more enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: exiting canyon into tree-lined riverside area with morning mist

agents.ego_description: walking toward river through scattered trees and misty atmosphere

entered.detail: scattered deciduous trees with green foliage lining the approach to the water
calm river surface visible through the mist at the end of the trail
low-lying fog hovering over the water and surrounding vegetation

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the landscape opens into a riverside area with scattered trees and morning mist hovering over the water. The dirt trail leads directly toward the river, with utility poles now visible only on the far right. The atmosphere remains hazy with soft diffused lighting.

events.description: character steps into river water and begins wading across

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow river water toward the opposite bank

entered.detail: large boulders and stones visible beneath the water surface
rippling water surface with gentle current around the character's legs

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the shallow river, transitioning from dirt trail to water. The camera follows as the character wades through the current, with river rocks visible beneath the surface and the opposite bank visible through the mist. The lighting becomes slightly backlit as the character moves toward the far shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty rural landscape that transitions from open grasslands into a confined canyon before ending in a shallow river crossing. It begins on a flat dirt trail flanked by tall grass, passing abandoned stone ruins and utility poles under a heavy morning haze. As the path progresses, the environment tightens into a narrow rocky canyon with steep walls that obscure the sky and create an enclosed atmosphere. The scene then opens back up into a riverside area where the mist hovers over the water and the trail leads toward a scattering of trees. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the dirt path to wade through the current of a shallow river, moving toward the far shore under soft, backlit lighting.
